label: Legal History & Jurisprudence
description:
Legal traditions from ancient Sumer to 19th century codification (Roman, Islamic, Jewish, Chinese, Japanese, common law, civil law), ~40 historical law codes from Code of Ur-Nammu to BGB, and ~70 foundational legal concepts (lex talionis, habeas corpus, stare decisis, mens rea, ius gentium, ijma, ijtihad, responsa).

Import scripts: Wikidata landmark court cases (Marbury v. Madison, etc.), Yale Avalon Project historical legal documents index.

Atom IDs: law:tradition:*, law:code:*, law:concept:*, law:case:*, law:doc:*
license: Public domain (legal terminology and historical texts)
attribution: Yale Avalon Project | Wikidata | Uppsala Conflict Data Program (UCDP)
